convertToArticle.descriptionPickPlanning: Pick the planning the article should end up in, or leave it empty to create a new one. Pick a date for the article. The timeless remains available.
convertToArticle.failed: Could not create the new document. Try again or cancel.

convertToTimeless.description: Pick a subject category for the new timeless. The article remains in place.
convertToTimeless.publishedDisabled: Published articles cannot be saved as timeless.

removeHastPrompt.title: Remove HAST from article
removeHastPrompt.description: This removes HAST and makes it a normal article. Future versions will not be sent as HAST unless you enable it again.

removeHastPromptTimeless.title: Remove HAST from timeless
removeHastPromptTimeless.description: This removes HAST and makes it a normal timeless. Future versions will not be sent as HAST unless you enable it again.
